message:
fix(sync): remap dependencies on import collision and fix export backups

- Implemented 3-phase import logic (Scan, Remap, Execute) to correctly update dependencies when an incoming issue's ID is remapped due to collision (e.g. external_ref match).
- Fixed backup_before_export compilation error and updated tests.
- Fixed br show to display tombstones instead of silently succeeding with empty output (fixes E2E tests).
- Added regression test tests/repro_import_collision_remap.rs.
